sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 143:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 143:1
items.html: Two lights contain all the degrees. These are light of Hochma and light of Hassadim. Hence, the five phases, called KHB, ZA, and Malchut, are called by these names, only when they are light of Hochma. However, when they are light of Hassadim, they are called HGT NH, or five Hassadim, or five edges. This is so when they have the level of the light of phase one. But when they have only the light of Malchut, they are called five Gevurot. (Inner Light, Item‎ 60)
